sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n665" key="a)glao/fwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγλαό-φωνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n665.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a splendid voice</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
